content: Write SQL migration for axe_intel table (Supabase Studio)
Build /api/tradingos/snapshot FastAPI route with clean Bloomberg-grade schema
Build services/supabase_sync.py (httpx-based mirror, no new deps)
Hook supabase sync into sweep loop (non-blocking, safe)
Open CORS for tradingosapp.com + 3 localhost ports
Smoke test endpoint + verify no regressions
